choose.when: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId})
AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId})
choose.otherwise: AND (EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM residence r WHERE r.person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(r.region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)) OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(a.applicant_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)))

mapper.select: SELECT FROM certificate c JOIN person p ON p.person_id=c.person_id WHERE c.certificate_id=#{id}
SELECT FROM certificate c JOIN person p ON p.person_id=c.person_id WHERE c.certificate_id=#{id}
SELECT current_status_code FROM person WHERE person_id=#{personId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certificate c JOIN person p ON p.person_id=c.person_id
SELECT FROM certificate c JOIN person p ON p.person_id=c.person_id ORDER BY c.certificate_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE certificate SET certificate_type=#{value.certificateType},certificate_no=#{value.certificateNo},issue_date=#{value.issueDate},expire_date=#{value.expireDate},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE certificate_id=#{value.certificateId} AND status='ACTIVE' AND version=#{version}

UPDATE certificate SET status='CANCELLED',cancel_reason=#{reason},cancelled_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE certificate_id=#{id} AND status='ACTIVE' AND version=#{version}
